FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class LineBreaker

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.dll

THE single source of truth for line breaking, ellipsis fitting, and wrapped-box measurement — extracted verbatim from the D3D12 GlyphRenderer shaping so the layout MEASURE path and the glyph RENDER path can never disagree on where lines break or how tall a wrapped block is (the GDI-measure/DWrite-render mismatch that overlapped wrapped content). Pure, COM-free, allocation-free over a ReadOnlySpan<T> + a struct IAdvanceSource. wrap uses the TextWrap enum value (0 = NoWrap, 1 = Wrap, 2 = WrapWholeWords); trim uses the TextTrim enum value (0 = None). LTR design-advance positioning (matches the v1 renderer).

public static class LineBreaker

Methods

FitEllipsis<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char>, int, int, float, float, in TAdv)

The exclusive end index of the longest prefix of [s,e) that fits in maxWidth with room for the ellipsis.

public static int FitEllipsis<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char> text, int s, int e, float maxWidth, float ellipsisW, in TAdv adv) where TAdv : struct, IAdvanceSource

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>
s int
e int
maxWidth float
ellipsisW float
adv TAdv

Returns

int

Type Parameters

TAdv

MeasureRange<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char>, int, int, in TAdv)

Sum of advances over [s,e).

public static float MeasureRange<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char> text, int s, int e, in TAdv adv) where TAdv : struct, IAdvanceSource

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>
s int
e int
adv TAdv

Returns

float

Type Parameters

TAdv

MeasureWrapped<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char>, float, int, int, int, float, in TAdv)

Measure a (possibly wrapping/trimming) run: line count, widest line width, total box height. Mirrors the GlyphRenderer.ShapeInto line loop exactly. Width is clamped to maxWidth when finite.

public static (int lines, float width, float height) MeasureWrapped<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char> text, float maxWidth, int wrap, int trim, int maxLines, float lineHeight, in TAdv adv) where TAdv : struct, IAdvanceSource

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>
maxWidth float
wrap int
trim int
maxLines int
lineHeight float
adv TAdv

Returns

(int lines, float width, float height)

Type Parameters

TAdv

SkipSpaces(ReadOnlySpan<char>, int) 

public static int SkipSpaces(ReadOnlySpan<char> text, int i)

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>
i int

Returns

int

WrapEnd<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char>, int, int, float, int, in TAdv)

Greedy line break: the exclusive end index of the line starting at start that fits within maxWidth (breaking at word boundaries; inside an over-long word only when wrap == Wrap (1)).

public static int WrapEnd<TAdv>(ReadOnlySpan<char> text, int start, int n, float maxWidth, int wrap, in TAdv adv) where TAdv : struct, IAdvanceSource

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>
start int
n int
maxWidth float
wrap int
adv TAdv

Returns

int

Type Parameters

TAdv
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
